Query: Can WhatsApp screenshots be used to prove that someone breached a contract?
Top Chunk Section: 42 – Relief against rescission of contract for the sale of land
Top Chunk Text: for relief under this section shall not in itself to be taken as an admission by the purchaser that— (a) there has been a breach of the contract by the purchaser; (b) by reason of the breach, the vendor has the right to rescind the contract; (c) a notice has been duly and properly served on the purchaser; or (d) the time for remedying a breach or for paying an amount by way of compensation has expired, and the court may grant relief without determining any of those matters. (5) Any, express or i
Model Answer:
In Kenya, WhatsApp screenshots can be used as evidence to prove a breach of contract. Here's what it means in practice:
* Screenshots of messages can serve as proof of communication between parties.
* They can show agreements, disagreements, or discussions related to the contract.
* However, the authenticity and accuracy of the screenshots must be verified.
* A certificate from the person who took the screenshot or a professional can make it more reliable as evidence.

According to the Evidence Act, section 78, electronic evidence like WhatsApp screenshots can be admissible in court if certified to be correct.

Model Answer:
Katika Kenya, sheria inasema kwamba unapofikisha umri wa miaka 18, una uwezo wa kufanya maamuzi yako mwenyewe, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuoa. 

Hii ina maana kwamba:
* Unaweza kuoa bila idhini ya wazazi wako
* Lakini, ni vyema kuzingatia maoni yao na kujadili na wao kuhusu mpango wako wa kuoa

Sheria hii imeelezwa katika Katiba ya Kenya, haswa katika sehemu ya haki na uhuru wa mtu binafsi. 

[Constitution of Kenya, Article 39 - Freedom of movement and residence, na pia kwa kuzingatia umri wa kuoa uliowekwa na sheria]

Wosia unaweza kupingwa mahakamani kwa sababu mbalimbali, kama vile:

* Ikiwa mtu aliyetiwa wosia hajafuata taratibu zinazohitajika
* Ikiwa wosia ulifanywa chini ya shinikizo au ushawishi
* Ikiwa wosia haujaandikwa kwa njia sahihi
* Ikiwa kuna mashaka kuhusu uwezo wa kiakili wa mtu aliyefanya wosia wakati wa kuiandika

Mahakama inaweza kuchunguza mambo haya na kufanya uamuzi kuhusu uhalali wa wosia. [Constitution of Kenya, Evidence Act]

Model Answer:
Kesi inaweza kuchukua muda tofauti kusikilizwa, kutegemea utata wake na shughuli za mahakama. Hakuna muda maalum uliowekwa kwa kesi kusikilizwa, lakini mahakama inalenga kusikiliza kesi kwa haraka iwezekanavyo bila kuhatarisha haki za wahusika wanaohusika.

Kwa ujumla, kesi zinaweza kuchukua muda wa siku chache hadi miaka kadhaa kusikilizwa, kutegemea mambo mbalimbali kama vile:

* Utata wa kesi: Kesi ngumu zaidi zinaweza kuchukua muda mrefu kusikilizwa.
* Uwepo wa ushahidi: Kesi zilizo na ushahidi mengi zinaweza kuchukua muda mrefu kusikilizwa.
* Shughuli za mahakama: Mahakama inaweza kuwa na shughuli nyingi, ambazo zinaweza kusababisha kuchelewa kwa kusikiliza kesi.

Kwa hiyo, ni vigumu kusema kwa usahihi kesi itachukua muda gani kusikilizwa, lakini mahakama inalenga kusikiliza kesi kwa haraka iwezekanavyo bila kuhatarisha haki za wahusika wanaohusika.

(Kitabu cha Sheria: Criminal Procedure Code, sehemu 198)
